message:
feat(ui): Enhance TUI components with theming, shortcuts, and polish

Comprehensive UI/UX improvements across TUI components:

src/ui/components/breadcrumbs.rs:
- Added breadcrumb navigation component
- Better workspace path display
- Click-to-filter support

src/ui/components/help_strip.rs:
- Enhanced keyboard shortcut display
- Context-aware help text
- Mode indicators

src/ui/components/palette.rs:
- Added command palette component
- Fuzzy command matching
- Recent commands history
- Keyboard navigation

src/ui/components/pills.rs:
- Enhanced filter pills with hover states
- Better multi-select UX
- Animated transitions

src/ui/components/theme.rs:
- Added comprehensive theme system
- Dark/light mode support
- Custom accent colors
- High contrast accessibility mode

src/ui/components/widgets.rs:
- Score indicators for search results
- Progress bars
- Input field components

src/ui/shortcuts.rs:
- Centralized keyboard shortcut definitions
- Vim-style navigation
- Customization support

src/ui/time_parser.rs:
- Enhanced relative time parsing
- Natural language date inputs
- Timezone handling

src/sources/sync.rs:
- Minor sync improvements
- Better error handling

src/update_check.rs:
- Added update notification improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
